messages.title: The parameters for DungeonGenerateParameter will be changed in the next version.
messages.body: Added dungeon expansion policy and starting position specification. Please refer to the migration guide.

messages.title: DungeonGenerator 1.9.1 is coming soon, and version 2.0 is in development.
messages.body: Version 2.0 is planned to include breaking changes and new level design concepts. Bug fixes for the 1.9 series will continue as needed.
